# Healthy Diet, Healthy Life – The Link Between Diet and Cancer Prevention: Interview with Kay-Tee Khaw

Kay-Tee Khaw, Professor of Clinical Gerontology, University of Cambridge, shares why maintaining a healthy diet and lifestyle can help prevent cancer and other diseases—so we can have a high quality of life. This interview took place at the inaugural International Conference on Cancer Prevention and Nutrition, organized by Ludwig Cancer Research and Cancer Research UK and convened in collaboration with the Medical Research Council.
